services.groupClassDesc: Learn together, pay less — classes of 2 to 15 students

howItWorks.title: How does it work?
howItWorks.step1Desc: Create your account in 2 minutes. Add your child and their grade. Free for 30 days.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Live tutoring, group classes, exam prep, or homework help — you choose what fits.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Via video from your phone. Works even on 3G. Track progress from your dashboard.
howItWorks.verifiedDesc: Every teacher goes through 3-step verification: national ID, diploma, and introduction video.
howItWorks.mobileDesc: Built for Android phones on 3G networks. Lightweight pages, adaptive video.
howItWorks.paymentDesc: Pay easily with Orange Money or Wave. Confirmed in 2 minutes. Diaspora: PayPal accepted.
howItWorks.safeDesc: Teachers never see your children's contact information. Security and privacy guaranteed.

dreams.title: They can become anything
dreams.subtitle: Every child has immense potential. With the right teachers, there are no limits.

testimonial.quote: I've been teaching math for 8 years in Abidjan. With écoleVersity, I can reach students across all of Ivory Coast, even in Bouaké and San-Pédro. The platform handles everything — payments, reminders, safety. I just focus on teaching.
testimonial.author: Mrs. Koné Aminata
testimonial.quoteStudent: My daughter was preparing for BEPC and struggling with physics. In 3 weeks of classes on écoleVersity, she raised her average from 8 to 14. The teacher was patient and explained everything clearly.

cta.title: Try free for 30 days
cta.subtitle: Sign up now and give your child access to the best teachers — from your phone.

adminAnalytics.title: Analytics
adminAnalytics.subtitle: Business health at a glance — numbers, trends, and acquisition-readiness.
adminAnalytics.dataNoteBody: Direct queries over Supabase — profiles, transactions, live_classes. No cache, no aggregation. More data lands and the Retention / Investor tabs activate.

acquisition.missingTitle: Missing for the full acquisition view
acquisition.missingBody: Visit → signup → first purchase funnel, source attribution (organic / referral / WhatsApp / paid), geographic map by city. These arrive once we track signup source (utm/referrer field).

marketplace.title: Marketplace — coming soon
marketplace.body: Liquidity (match rate), supply/demand per subject×grade, teacher utilization, cancellation rate. Needs 2–3 weeks of activity data to be meaningful.

retention.title: Retention & Economics — coming soon
retention.body: D1/D7/D30 cohorts, parent + teacher LTV, CAC, LTV:CAC ratio, cohort revenue curves. Ready with 60+ days of data.

operations.title: Operations — coming soon
operations.body: Payment/payout latency, ticket SLA, moderation hit rate, fraud, refunds. Ready to build once we have volume.

investor.title: Investor pack — coming soon
investor.body: One-page investor summary: ARR, MoM growth, take rate, LTV:CAC, geographic reach, market penetration. PDF export. Ready once the tabs above fill out.

adminAgents.whatsappReportSoon: Available once the CEO agent is live
adminAgents.thresholdHelper: Below this threshold, the agent escalates the decision to you.
adminAgents.phase7Body: The dashboard is ready but the agents aren't running yet. The VPS service (PM2 + Docker) deploys after MVP launch. Meanwhile, real escalations come from /admin/payments and /admin/verification.
adminAgents.phase7Notice: Agent on standby — activated with the Phase 7 deployment.

about.title: About écoleVersity
about.subtitle: We believe every child deserves quality academic support, wherever they are. écoleVersity connects families to the best teachers through technology.
about.missionText: écoleVersity was born from a simple observation: in Ivory Coast and West Africa, finding a good teacher for your child is a challenge. The best teachers are often in Abidjan, and families in other cities don't have access. Our platform removes this geographical barrier, allowing any student from CP1 to Terminale to learn live with verified teachers — from a simple phone and 3G connection.
about.howTeachersDesc: Every teacher goes through 3-step verification: national ID, diploma, and introduction video.
about.howLiveDesc: Classes are conducted by video, live. Your child interacts with their teacher as if they were in the same room.
about.howCoursesDesc: In addition to live tutoring, access recorded courses and exam prep tests for CEPE, BEPC, and BAC.
about.valueSafetyDesc: Teachers never see your children's contact information. Security and privacy guaranteed.
about.valueExcellenceDesc: We select the most qualified teachers and monitor quality through parent reviews.
about.valueAccessDesc: Designed to work on 3G networks with a simple Android phone.
about.valueInnovationDesc: Our AI tutors learn from the official Ivorian curriculum for personalized 24/7 support.
about.contactText: Questions? Suggestions? Our team is here to help.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance
acceptance.text: By accessing écoleVersity (ecoleversity.com), you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not accept, please do not use the platform.

services.title: 2. Services
services.text: écoleVersity is an online tutoring platform connecting parents/students with verified teachers. Services include: live video tutoring, group classes, recorded courses, exam preparation, homework help, and on-demand tutoring.

accounts.title: 3. User accounts
accounts.text: You must create an account to use our services. You are responsible for your credentials. Parent accounts manage their children's profiles. Teacher accounts require identity verification (national ID + diploma).

payments.title: 4. Payments
payments.text: Payments are made via Orange Money, Wave, or PayPal. Amounts are in FCFA. A 20% commission is taken on each transaction. Teachers receive 80% and are paid weekly.

refunds.title: 5. Refunds
refunds.text: If a class doesn't go as planned, a credit is added to your écoleVersity wallet. Requests must be made within 48 hours. The satisfaction guarantee allows a 50% credit (max 2 times per year).

teachers.title: 6. Teacher obligations
teachers.text: Teachers must provide authentic documents, respect scheduled times, maintain professional conduct, and not contact students or parents outside the platform.

conduct.title: 7. Code of conduct
conduct.text: It is forbidden to share personal contact info in messages, send images in DMs, use inappropriate language, create multiple accounts, or bypass the payment system.

children.title: 8. Child protection
children.text: écoleVersity takes child safety seriously. Teachers communicate only with parent accounts. Messages are analyzed for contact sharing attempts. Content is moderated by AI.

content.title: 9. Intellectual property
content.text: Courses created by teachers remain their property. By publishing on écoleVersity, teachers grant a non-exclusive license to distribute content to enrolled students.

contact.title: 10. Contact blocking
contact.text: For student safety, écoleVersity automatically blocks contact sharing attempts. Phone numbers, emails, social media, and URLs are detected and masked.

termination.title: 11. Termination
termination.text: écoleVersity may suspend or terminate accounts for violations. Teacher sanctions: warning, 7-day restriction, 30-day restriction, permanent ban.

liability.title: 12. Liability
liability.text: écoleVersity is a marketplace. Teachers are independent contractors. The platform is not responsible for network interruptions.

modifications.title: 13. Changes
modifications.text: écoleVersity reserves the right to modify these terms. Users will be notified of important changes by email.

collection.title: 1. Data collected
collection.text: We collect: account info (name, email, phone), student profiles (first name, grade), teacher data (ID, diplomas, availability), transactions, messages (analyzed for safety), and usage data.

usage.title: 2. Data usage
usage.text: Your data is used to provide services, verify teachers, process payments, send notifications, improve the platform, and protect student safety.

children.title: 3. Children's data protection
children.text: Student data has enhanced protection. Only parents manage profiles. Teachers only see first name and grade. Contact info is never shared. No images in DMs.

storage.title: 4. Storage
storage.text: Data stored on Supabase in Europe (Paris, eu-west-3). Encrypted in transit (HTTPS/TLS) and at rest. Daily backups. Payment data processed by Orange Money, Wave, and PayPal.

thirdParties.title: 5. Third parties
thirdParties.text: We share data with: Supabase (database), Resend (emails), Jitsi/JaaS (video), PayPal (payments), Cloudflare (videos), Anthropic (AI chatbot). We never sell your data.

cookies.title: 6. Cookies
cookies.text: écoleVersity uses essential cookies only: authentication, language preferences, user session. No advertising cookies or third-party trackers.

rights.title: 7. Your rights
rights.text: You have rights to access, rectify, delete, and export your data. Contact: info@ecoleversity.com

security.title: 8. Security
security.text: Measures: HTTPS/TLS, Supabase Auth, Row Level Security on every table, HMAC webhook verification, contact detection, AI content moderation.

changes.title: 9. Changes
changes.text: This policy may be updated. We will notify you of important changes by email.

contact.title: 10. Contact
contact.text:
For questions about your data: info@ecoleversity.com
Website: ecoleversity.com/support
